summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Percorso Veloce (Go Live in 21 giorni) fast track mode. All 6 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly including countdown hero, daily checklist with toggle persistence, 5-phase stepper with ORA badge, and sidebar link.
critical_code_review_comments: PercorsoVelocePage correctly implements all required features: countdown hero, daily checklist, 5-phase stepper
Countdown hero shows 'Giorno 1' with '20 giorni rimasti' (days remaining) and progress bar
Daily checklist shows 3 tasks for day 1 with toggle functionality that persists to backend
Phase stepper shows 5 phases: Posizionamento (1-2), Webinar (3-7), Funnel (8-10), Traffico (11-14), Webinar Live (15-21)
Current phase (Posizionamento) has 'ORA' badge and highlighted border
Sidebar shows 'Go Live in 21gg' link with red Zap icon (data-testid='sidebar-percorso-veloce')
Backend endpoints correctly implemented: POST /activate, GET /{partner_id}, POST /save-checklist
PERCORSO_VELOCE_PHASES data structure correctly defines all 21 days of tasks across 5 phases
All data-testid attributes present: countdown-hero, phase-stepper, daily-checklist, phase-*, task-*
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto)
seed_data_creation: Partner ID 3 (Marco Orlandi) was activated during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Percorso Veloce (Go Live in 21 giorni) fully tested. Navigation: Login as admin → Click 'Vista Partner' tab → Click 'Go Live in 21gg' in sidebar. Page features: 1) Countdown hero with 'Giorno X' and days remaining, 2) Daily checklist with toggle persistence (3 tasks for day 1), 3) 5-phase stepper with current phase highlighted and 'ORA' badge. Backend endpoints: POST /api/partner-journey/percorso-veloce/activate, GET /api/partner-journey/percorso-veloce/{partner_id}, POST /api/partner-journey/percorso-veloce/save-checklist. Partner ID 2 (Arianna Aceto) has percorso veloce activated at day 1.
